title: Calliprena cernua
taxonomy: Calliprena cernua is classified as a type of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it is a species within the genus Calliprinenia and section Cremnorchis. The exact classification can be further detailed as Calliprena cernua is a species of the genus Calliprinenia, section Cremnorchis, within the subtribe Coelogyneinae, tribe Coelogyneae, and subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification places it among the terrestrial orchids, which are often epiphytic or terrestrial in nature. The classification of Calliprena cernua is subject to ongoing research and potential revisions in the field of orchid taxonomy.
